combinedStudyTracks.description: You can combine similar study tracks together. Secondary study tracks will be hidden from forms and mapped to the selected primary study track.

progressView.title: Progress

help.table:
Filtering Tools

The top of the table offers several filtering options, such as active or inactive theses. Hovering the cursor over a button displays additional information about that selection.

Target Date

The Target Date column is colored when the target date is exceeded. When the target date is exceeded by a month, the column turns yellow, and after six months, it turns red.

Phase

The Phase column becomes greener the further the thesis stages have progressed. This functionality is only available in degree programs that use stages.

Icons

Icons may appear at the end of a row. Hovering the cursor over an icon displays additional information. A star icon indicates that you are the main supervisor of the thesis. An exclamation mark indicates that the thesis is awaiting your approval.
